stemHtml: Which of these statements concerning flight in turbulence is correct?

options.a: V<sub>B</sub> is the design speed for maximum gust intensity.
options.b: The load factor in turbulence may fluctuate above and below 1, but will not become negative.
options.c: In severe turbulence, speed should be reduced to approximately 1.2 V<sub>S</sub>.
options.d: The load factor in turbulence cannot exceed the ultimate load factor.
